convert-pdf-to-doc-image-only.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Image‑Only Extraction
convert-pdf-to-doc-image-only.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to a DOC document using Aspose.Pdf while preserving images only via the Textbox recognition mode.

convert-pdf-to-docx-auto-detection.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Automatic Layout Detection
convert-pdf-to-docx-auto-detection.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf with DocSaveOptions.Mode set to Flow for automatic content detection.

convert-pdf-to-doc-plain-text.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Plain Text Extraction
convert-pdf-to-doc-plain-text.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to a DOC file using Aspose.Pdf while configuring DocSaveOptions to use Textbox recognition mode for extracting only plain text.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-report.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Generate Conversion Report
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-report.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to DOCX using DocSaveOptions, and creating a JSON report of the conversion outcome.

convert-pdf-to-doc.title: Convert PDF to DOC using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-doc.description: Shows how to load a PDF file and save it as a DOC document with default text recognition using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-metadata.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-metadata.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf while setting custom metadata properties such as Title and Author.

convert-pdf-to-docx-layout-preservation.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-layout-preservation.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file and save it as a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf while preserving the original layout.

convert-pdf-to-docx-enhanced-recognition.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Enhanced Table and Graphic Recognition
convert-pdf-to-docx-enhanced-recognition.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf with enhanced recognition settings for complex tables and graphics.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Slides as Images
convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf, rendering each slide as a raster image by setting SlidesAsImages to true.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-flow-hyphenatio.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Flow Recognition for Hyphenation
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-flow-hyphenatio.description: Loads a PDF, configures DocSaveOptions to use Flow recognition mode and hyphenation‑friendly settings, and saves the result as a DOCX file.

convert-pdf-to-pptx.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx.description: Shows how to load a PDF file and save it as an editable PowerPoint (PPTX) presentation using Aspose.Pdf's default save options.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-footnotes.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Footnote Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-footnotes.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf while preserving footnotes and other layout elements by enabling EnhancedFlow recognition mode.

convert-pdf-to-docx-and-zip.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Zip the Result
convert-pdf-to-docx-and-zip.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF file to DOCX format and then compress the generated DOCX into a ZIP archive for storage.

convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Extract Images
convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf and then extract all embedded images to a designated output directory.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress-handle.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress-handle.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf and attach a custom progress handler that logs conversion progress events.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-table-of-figure.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Table of Figures
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-table-of-figure.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, extracting image information, creating a Table of Figures, and saving the document as a DOCX file using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pptx-slidesasimage.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pptx-slidesasimage.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files to PPTX format in a single run, using Aspose.Pdf with the SlidesAsImages option enabled to rasterize each slide as an image.

pdf-to-pptx-to-pdfa.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and then to PDF/A
pdf-to-pptx-to-pdfa.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf, then convert the PPTX back to a PDF/A archival format.

convert-pdf-to-docx-embed-custom-fonts.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Embedded Custom Fonts
convert-pdf-to-docx-embed-custom-fonts.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf while registering a custom TrueType font and enabling font embedding to preserve rendering consistency.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v2.title: Convert PDF to PPTX
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and save it directly as a PowerPoint PPTX file.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-slidesasimages-high-.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with SlidesAsImages and High DPI
convert-pdf-to-pptx-slidesasimages-high-.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a PPTX presentation where each slide is rendered as a single high‑resolution image by enabling SlidesAsImages and setting the image DPI.

convert-pdf-to-single-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Single-Page HTML with Embedded Resources
convert-pdf-to-single-page-html.description: Shows how to load a PDF and save it as a single‑page HTML file that embeds fonts, images and CSS, preserving the original layout using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-to-docx-to-pdfa-conversion.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and then to PDF/A
pdf-to-docx-to-pdfa-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF file to DOCX format and subsequently create a PDF/A‑1b compliant document from the generated DOCX.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-add-document-propert.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Add Custom Document Properties
convert-pdf-to-pptx-add-document-propert.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set custom metadata such as subject and author, and convert the document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page HTML with SplitIntoPages
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-html.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML output split across multiple pages by enabling the SplitIntoPages option in Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Compression
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while enabling SVG compression to reduce the size of embedded SVG graphics.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf while attaching a custom progress handler to monitor conversion status.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-embed-fonts.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Embedded Fonts
convert-pdf-to-pptx-embed-fonts.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf and embed font glyphs by enabling the CacheGlyphs option.

convert-pdf-to-html-zip.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Package as ZIP
convert-pdf-to-html-zip.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF into separate HTML pages with assets using Aspose.Pdf and then zipping the output folder for distribution.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-compress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Compress the File
convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-compress.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf and then recompress the PPTX (a ZIP package) to reduce its file size.

convert-pdf-to-html-png-page-background.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG Page Backgrounds
convert-pdf-to-html-png-page-background.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML while rendering all page background images as a single embedded PNG per page using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-export-slide-numbers.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Export Slide Numbers to CSV
convert-pdf-to-pptx-export-slide-numbers.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf and then generate a CSV file containing slide numbers (titles are not available without Aspose.Slides).

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v3.title: Convert PDF to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v3.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to a PowerPoint PPTX file by loading the PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Document and saving it with the PPTX format.

convert-pdf-to-responsive-html.title: Convert PDF to Responsive HTML with CSS
convert-pdf-to-responsive-html.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a single HTML file using Aspose.Pdf and then injecting a mobile‑friendly CSS stylesheet to make the output responsive.

convert-pdf-pages-to-separate-html-files.title: Convert PDF Pages to Separate HTML Files
convert-pdf-pages-to-separate-html-files.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure HtmlSaveOptions to split the document into pages, and save each page as an individual HTML file.

convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-images.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and save the pages as JPEG files using JpegDevice with the default quality setting.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v4.title: Convert PDF to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v4.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation by loading the PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Document and saving it with the PPTX format.

add-company-logo-and-convert-pdf-to-pptx.title: Add Company Logo to PDF and Convert to PPTX
add-company-logo-and-convert-pdf-to-pptx.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, stamping each page with a logo image, and converting the modified document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-annotation-note.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Extract Annotation Notes
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-annotation-note.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts text from its annotations on each page, and then converts the document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf. The extracted notes are stored in a dictionary for potential insertion as speaker notes in the resulting slides.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Apply Custom CSS
convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a single HTML document using Aspose.Pdf and then injecting a custom CSS stylesheet into the generated HTML.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page TIFF with TiffDevice
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document and converting all its pages into a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with custom resolution and settings.

pdf-to-split-html-combine-to-pdf.title: Convert PDF to Split HTML, Combine Pages, and Convert Back to PDF
pdf-to-split-html-combine-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF into separate HTML files (one per page), merging those HTML pages into a single document, and then converting the combined HTML back into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-html-per-page-image-subfo.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Per‑Page Image Subfolders
convert-pdf-to-html-per-page-image-subfo.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and store each page's extracted images in separate subfolders via a custom resource‑saving strategy.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Compression
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and enabling the CompressSvgGraphicsIfAny option to reduce the size of embedded SVG images.

convert-pdf-to-bmp-images.title: Convert PDF to BMP Images
convert-pdf-to-bmp-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page as a BMP file using BmpDevice with default settings.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-auto-tagging.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑4 with Auto‑Tagging
convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-auto-tagging.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to PDF/A‑4 format using Aspose.Pdf while enabling automatic tagging via AutoTaggingSettings.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-png-preserve-folde.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PNG While Preserving Folder Structure
batch-convert-pdfs-to-png-preserve-folde.description: Demonstrates how to recursively convert all PDF files in a source directory to PNG images using Aspose.Pdf, creating matching subfolders in a destination directory.

convert-pdf-to-emf-images.title: Convert PDF Pages to EMF Images
convert-pdf-to-emf-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create an EmfDevice at a given resolution, and convert each page to a vector EMF image saved to a file.

convert-pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.title: Convert PCL to PDF with HP‑GL/2 Vector Support
convert-pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.description: Demonstrates loading a PCL file, enabling HP‑GL/2 vector graphics via the NewEngine conversion engine, and saving the result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-images.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Images Extraction
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-images.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while extracting vector graphics as separate SVG files stored in a specified folder.

pdf-to-docx-with-embedded-fonts.title: Convert PDF to DOCX via HTML with Embedded Fonts
pdf-to-docx-with-embedded-fonts.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML while embedding fonts, then loading the HTML and saving it as a DOCX with fonts embedded to ensure consistent rendering.

pdf-to-html-with-toc.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Table of Contents
pdf-to-html-with-toc.description: Shows how to convert a PDF into separate HTML pages using Aspose.Pdf and then create an index.html that links to each page as a table of contents.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg-images.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images with Custom Naming
batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg-images.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, convert each page to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images with a custom naming pattern.

convert-pdf-to-minified-html.title: Convert PDF to Minified HTML
convert-pdf-to-minified-html.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to HTML with embedded images, and then minifying the generated HTML by stripping comments and excess whitespace.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v5.title: Convert PDF to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v5.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PowerPoint PPTX file directly with Aspose.Pdf, without needing Aspose.Slides.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-embedded-custom.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Custom Fonts
convert-pdf-to-html-with-embedded-custom.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while embedding a custom TrueType/OpenType font via @font-face rules in the generated CSS.

convert-pdf-to-html-png-background.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG Page Backgrounds
convert-pdf-to-html-png-background.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while rendering page backgrounds as embedded PNG images.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa3b-with-font-substitu.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b with Font Substitution
convert-pdf-to-pdfa3b-with-font-substitu.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑3B using Aspose.Pdf while substituting missing fonts via FontRepository.

convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document to PNG images using Aspose.Pdf's PngDevice while enabling a transparent background.

convert-pdf-page-region-to-png.title: Convert PDF Page Region to PNG
convert-pdf-page-region-to-png.description: Shows how to extract a defined rectangular region from a PDF page and render it as a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-markdown-to-pdf.title: Convert Markdown to PDF Preserving Code Blocks
convert-markdown-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a Markdown file with MdLoadOptions and convert it directly to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, preserving formatting such as code blocks.

pdf-to-html-to-pptx-embed-fonts.title: Convert PDF to HTML and then to PPTX with Embedded Fonts
pdf-to-html-to-pptx-embed-fonts.description: The example converts a PDF document to an HTML file while embedding fonts as WOFF, then loads the HTML and saves it as a PPTX presentation, preserving the custom font appearance via glyph caching.

convert-pdf-to-text.title: Convert PDF to Text Using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-text.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber and saving it to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

validate-and-convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.title: Validate and Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b
validate-and-convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b.description: Shows how to validate a PDF against PDF/A‑1b, generate an XML validation log, convert the document to PDF/A‑1b with a conversion log, and save the compliant file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.title: Convert PDF Page to JPEG Image
convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.description: Shows how to load a PDF, validate a page number, and convert that specific page to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with the default DPI.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-error-action.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑4 with Error Action
convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-error-action.description: Loads a PDF document, configures conversion options to target PDF/A‑4 and sets the ConvertErrorAction to handle problematic elements, then performs the conversion and saves the result.

convert-pdf-to-latex-with-custom-macros.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX with Custom Macros
convert-pdf-to-latex-with-custom-macros.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF file to a LaTeX (.tex) document and prepend custom LaTeX macro definitions for special symbols.

pdf-to-html-pages-with-index.title: Convert PDF to Separate HTML Pages and Generate Index
pdf-to-html-pages-with-index.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into individual HTML page files using Aspose.Pdf and create an index.html that links to each page.

convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF to PNG images using Aspose.Pdf while enabling a transparent background for pages that contain an alpha channel.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document and convert all its pages into a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with default settings.

add-xml-attachment-to-pdfa1b.title: Add XML Attachment to PDF/A-1b Document
add-xml-attachment-to-pdfa1b.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/A‑1b compliance, embedding an external XML file as an attachment, and saving the resulting PDF/A‑1b file.

pdf-to-png-bradley-binarization.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Bradley Binarization
pdf-to-png-bradley-binarization.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF to a PNG image and then apply the Bradley binarization algorithm to improve contrast using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-gif-images.title: Convert PDF to GIF Images
convert-pdf-to-gif-images.description: Shows how to convert each page of a PDF document into separate GIF files using Aspose.Pdf's GifDevice with default parameters.

convert-ofd-to-pdf.title: Convert OFD to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-ofd-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an OFD document using OfdLoadOptions and save it as a PDF with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-missing-fonts-pdfa-conversion.title: Replace Missing Fonts During PDF/A Conversion with Font Substitution
replace-missing-fonts-pdfa-conversion.description: Shows how to configure font substitution and fallback fonts when converting a PDF to PDF/A using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF
batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Shows how to merge all PDF files in a folder and convert the combined document into a multi‑page TIFF archive using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-epub.title: Convert PDF to EPUB using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-epub.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as an EPUB document using the default conversion settings.

convert-pdf-to-markdown.title: Convert PDF to Markdown
convert-pdf-to-markdown.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as a Markdown document using the default MarkdownSaveOptions.

add-file-attachment-to-pdfa3b.title: Add File Attachment to PDF/A‑3b Document
add-file-attachment-to-pdfa3b.description: Demonstrates embedding an external text file as an attachment, adding a file‑attachment annotation, and converting the PDF to PDF/A‑3b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-xslfo-to-pdf.title: Convert XSL‑FO to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
convert-xslfo-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XSL‑FO file with XslFoLoadOptions and convert it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's Document class.

convert-pdf-to-html-and-create-sitemap.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Create Sitemap
convert-pdf-to-html-and-create-sitemap.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a single HTML page using Aspose.Pdf and then generating a simple sitemap.xml that lists the resulting HTML file.

enable-auto-tagging-pdfa-conversion.title: Enable Auto‑Tagging for PDF/A Conversion
enable-auto-tagging-pdfa-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to assign AutoTaggingSettings to PdfFormatConversionOptions to produce a tagged PDF/A document and capture conversion logs.

convert-pdf-to-epub-with-cover.title: Convert PDF to EPUB with Custom Cover and Metadata
convert-pdf-to-epub-with-cover.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to EPUB using Aspose.Pdf, add a custom cover image page, and set document metadata that is transferred to the EPUB.

convert-pdf-to-xps.title: Convert PDF to XPS using XpsSaveOptions
convert-pdf-to-xps.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as an XPS document using the default XpsSaveOptions settings.

convert-epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Convert EPUB to PDF with Custom Page Size
convert-epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Shows how to load an EPUB file using EpubLoadOptions to set a custom page size and convert it to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-latex-with-output-directo.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX with Specified Output Directory
convert-pdf-to-latex-with-output-directo.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to a LaTeX .tex file using Aspose.Pdf's TeXSaveOptions and set an output directory for auxiliary resources such as images.

convert-pdf-to-markdown-with-custom-head.title: Convert PDF to Markdown with Custom Heading Levels
convert-pdf-to-markdown-with-custom-head.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to Markdown using Aspose.Pdf while applying a heuristic heading recognition strategy and custom heading level mapping via HeadingLevels.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa3b-with-error-handlin.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b with Error Handling
convert-pdf-to-pdfa3b-with-error-handlin.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑3b using Aspose.Pdf, logging conversion details and throwing a custom exception when the conversion fails.

convert-pdf-to-svg.title: Convert PDF to SVG with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and save each page as an SVG file using Aspose.Pdf's default SvgSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml.title: Convert PDF to MobiXml
convert-pdf-to-mobixml.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as a MobiXml document using default MobiXmlSaveOptions.

xml-to-pdf-xsl-fo-transformation.title: Convert XML to PDF using XSL‑FO with Aspose.Pdf
xml-to-pdf-xsl-fo-transformation.description: Shows how to load an XML file, apply an XSL‑FO stylesheet via Aspose.Pdf, and save the transformed content as a PDF document.

convert-pdf-to-mobi-with-custom-metadata.title: Convert PDF to MOBI with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-mobi-with-custom-metadata.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, setting both standard and custom metadata, and saving the document as a MOBI file with MobiXmlSaveOptions.

convert-latex-to-pdf.title: Convert LaTeX File to PDF
convert-latex-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a LaTeX (.tex) file with Aspose.Pdf, configuring TeX options, and saving the rendered document as a PDF.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-skip-errors.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b and Skip Non-convertible Elements
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-skip-errors.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to PDF/A‑1b while skipping elements that cannot be converted, generating a conversion log, and saving the resulting PDF/A document.

convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-page-size.title: Convert PDF to XPS with Custom Page Size and Orientation
convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying a custom page size and landscape/portrait orientation to each page, and saving it as an XPS document using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-postscript-to-pdf.title: Convert PostScript to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
convert-postscript-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PostScript (.ps) file using PsLoadOptions and save it as a PDF with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-svg-with-css-embedding.title: Convert PDF to SVG with CSS Style Embedding
convert-pdf-to-svg-with-css-embedding.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure SvgSaveOptions, and save the document as an SVG file where CSS styles are embedded by default.

extract-visible-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Visible Text from PDF
extract-visible-text-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF document and uses Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber with TextExtractionOptions to extract only visible text, then saves it to a .txt file.

convert-pdf-to-utf8-text.title: Convert PDF to UTF-8 Text with Preserved Line Breaks
convert-pdf-to-utf8-text.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while preserving line breaks and save the output as a UTF-8 encoded text file.

create-multi-page-tiff-from-pdf.title: Create Multi‑Page TIFF from PDF
create-multi-page-tiff-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to convert all pages of a PDF document into a single multi‑page TIFF file using Aspose.Pdf's default compression.

create-single-page-tiff-from-first-pdf-p.title: Create Single-Page TIFF from First PDF Page
create-single-page-tiff-from-first-pdf-p.description: The example loads a PDF document, configures a TiffDevice with custom resolution and LZW compression, and converts only the first page into a single-page TIFF file.

convert-pdf-to-svg-with-custom-output-fo.title: Convert PDF to SVG Files with Custom Output Folder
convert-pdf-to-svg-with-custom-output-fo.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and save each page as an individual SVG file by providing a custom output folder path using Aspose.Pdf.
